title: Strategy
description: Define the audience, conversion goal, Web3 narrative, privacy boundaries, and content model.

title: Interface Design
description: Create a cinematic visual system with clear sections, strong hierarchy, and accessibility-aware motion.

title: Backend Setup
description: Build Express routes, HTMX partials, JSON datasets, contact validation, and deployment-friendly structure.

title: Motion Layer
description: Integrate the blackhole.glb background, cursor effects, scroll frames, modals, and reduced-motion controls.

title: Launch
description: Test performance, polish mobile layouts, configure SEO files, and prepare hosting instructions.
